title: Eyeing growth, DPUM to boost exports
body: PT Dua Putra Utama Makmur Tbk (DPUM) will expand its export market reach to three countries in order to increase 2025 revenue.

title: J Resources sets 40% profit growth this year
body: PT J Resources Asia Pasifik Tbk (PSAB) is confident that its performance, both operational and financial, will arrive positively this year, even improving from last year.

title: Pemberton Asian Opportunities owns 6.29% stake in PZZA
body: Pemberton Asian Opportunities Fund (PAOF) is known to have increased its share portion by 1.33% to 6.29% from the previous 4.96% in PT Sarimelati Kencana Tbk (PZZA), the manager of Pizza Hut outlets, in a transaction last week (12/12 ).

title: BSDE sets tender offer price for SMDM shares at IDR 531
body: PT Bumi Serpong Damai Tbk (BSDE) made a tender offer for 382.01 million shares or the equivalent of 8.01% of the paid up and issued capital of PT Suryamas Dutamakmur Tbk (SMDM) 4.77 billion.

title: January-November 2024, trade balance surplus declines 14.12%
body: The Central Statistics Agency (BPS) recorded that the trade balance surplus fell 14.12% to US$28.85 billion during January-November 2024 compared to the same period in 2023 of US$33.60 billion.

title: Eyeing growth, DPUM to boost exports
body: PT Dua Putra Utama Makmur Tbk (DPUM) will expand its export market reach to three countries in order to increase 2025 revenue.

title: J Resources sets 40% profit growth this year
body: PT J Resources Asia Pasifik Tbk (PSAB) is confident that its performance, both operational and financial, will arrive positively this year, even improving from last year.

title: Pemberton Asian Opportunities owns 6.29% stake in PZZA
body: Pemberton Asian Opportunities Fund (PAOF) is known to have increased its share portion by 1.33% to 6.29% from the previous 4.96% in PT Sarimelati Kencana Tbk (PZZA), the manager of Pizza Hut outlets, in a transaction last week (12/12 ).

title: BSDE sets tender offer price for SMDM shares at IDR 531
body: PT Bumi Serpong Damai Tbk (BSDE) made a tender offer for 382.01 million shares or the equivalent of 8.01% of the paid up and issued capital of PT Suryamas Dutamakmur Tbk (SMDM) 4.77 billion.

title: January-November 2024, trade balance surplus declines 14.12%
body: The Central Statistics Agency (BPS) recorded that the trade balance surplus fell 14.12% to US$28.85 billion during January-November 2024 compared to the same period in 2023 of US$33.60 billion.

title: Schroders seeks a way out, BNI to set up offering
body: Schroders, a global fund management from England, will reportedly close its business in Indonesia after 30 years of operation.

title: JCI saw 0.9% slippage to 7,258.63, liquidity tightened
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) was closed 0.9% or 66.16 index point lower to 7,258.63 yesterday (6/12).

title: New business lines propel LTLS to 120% profit growth
body: PT Lautan Luas Tbk (LTLS) reported a remarkable 120% year-on-year (yoy) increase in net profit attributable to the parent company, reaching IDR 183 billion as of September 2024.

title: Foreigners bought nearly 5 billion shares, net foreign surplus 1.29 billion shares
body: On Monday, December 16, foreign investors bought 4.84 billion shares from 946 issuers.

title: GOTO posted net foreign of 1.44 billion shares
body: PT Goto Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) posted net foreign shares of 1.44 billion, placing it at the top of top net foreign shares at the closing bell, Monday (16/12).

title: VAT will officially increase to 12% starting early next year
body: The Indonesian government has officially announced an increase in Value Added Tax (VAT) to 12% and will take effect from January 1, 2025.

title: Jon Fieris divests 9.2% of his shares in FITT
body: Jon Fieris reduced the volume of his shares in PT Hotel Fitra International Tbk (FITT) gradually by 9.2% in the last two weeks of December 2024. The total share sale transaction was recorded at IDR 11.47 billion.

title: Will NSSS profit increase next year?
body: ‘Because there are several considerations such as the B40 biodiesel programme.'

title: Significant price changes, IDX determines UMA status for these 3 shares
body: The Indonesian Stock Exchange (BEI) determined Unusual Market Activity (UMA) status for the shares of 3 issuers because their price movements were considered unusual.

title: First session, POLU shares rose 25%
body: PT Golden Flower Tbk (POLU) shares rose 25%, occupying the top gainers position at the close of the first stock trading session, Monday (16/12). The upward trend in the performance of this issuer's shares started last week (12/12).

title: Garibaldi Thohir increases share portion in PALM
body: Garibaldi Thohir is known to have increased his stake by 2.12% to 17.48% in PT Provident Investasi Bersama Tbk (PALM) in a transaction last week (12/12).

title: Sight Investment purchases 1.04 billion shares of Siloam Hospital (SILO), strengthening control to 63%
body: Sight Investment Company Pte Limited, a foreign investor, increased its holdings of PT Siloam International Hospitals Tbk (SILO) by 1.04 billion shares on Wednesday, December 11.

title: Hotel Candi Baru now owns 59.5% of Sido Muncul (SIDO) after acquiring 5.25 billion shares
body: PT Hotel Candi Baru purchased an additional 5.25 billion shares of PT Industri Jamu dan Farmasi Sido Muncul Tbk (SIDO) on Tuesday, December 10.

title: Performance improving, BBRI’s interim dividend is 60.7% higher this year
body: Interim dividend of PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI) increases 60.7% year-on-year (yoy) this year compared to 2023.

title: Expanding plantation in East Kalimantan, PSGO saw stock price increase
body: PT Palma Serasih Tbk (PSGO) is expanding its palm plantation in East Kalimantan by acquiring 100% of PT Sabhantara Rawi Sentosa (SRS) from PT Dhanistha Surya Nusantara (DSN) and PT Surya Nusantara Sawitindo (SNS) last week (12/12).

title: Alfamart to close loss-making outlets
body: PT Sumber Alfaria Trijaya Tbk (AMRT), the managing company of Alfamart and Alfamidi retail network, has closed down approximately 400 outlets since the beginning of this year due to their unprofitability.

title: Foreigners divesting, NCKL acquires Obi Nickel Cobalt for IDR 2.1 trillion
body: PT Trimegah Bangun Persada Tbk (NCKL) acquires a portion of the shares of PT Obi Nickel Cobalt amidst its shares’ mass-divestment throughout the week.

title: JCI corrected 0.79% last week, foreign investors recorded net sell IDR 2.7 trillion
body: The Composite Stock Price Index (IHSG) throughout last week (9-13/12) showed a decline of 0.79% or 57.99 points to IDR 7,324.79, following the high net selling volume by foreign investors (net foreign sell).

title: Adaro Strategic Investments acquires 3.2 billion Adaro Andalan (AADI) shares
body: On Monday, December 9, PT Adaro Strategic Investments made the decision to purchase about 3.20 billion shares of PT Adaro Andalan Indonesia Tbk (AADI) so as to become a new shareholder.

title: Foreign sell surpasses 3 billion shares, net foreign volume closed at -986 million shares
body: On Friday, December 13, foreign investors sold a total of 3.30 billion shares. Meanwhile, the total number of shares purchased was around 2.31 billion shares.

title: Weekend, BIPI stays on top of top net foreign
body: Closing stock transactions on the weekend (13/12), PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI) topped the net foreign list.

title: Visi Media Asia acquires 45% of Intermedia Capital (MDIA) shares
body: On Friday, December 6, PT Visi Media Asia Tbk acquired more than 17.64 billion shares of PT Intermedia Capital Tbk (MDIA), an issuer of content services, making it a new major stakeholder in the company.

title: JCI corrected 0.94% to 7,324.79, foreigners recorded net sell
body: The Composite Stock Price Index (IHSG) in trading on Friday (13/12) today closed down 0.94% or 69.45 points to 7,324.79, following the weakening of all sectoral indices.

title: NCKL stake in Obi Nickel Cobalt increased by 10%
body: PT Trimegah Bangun Persada Tbk (NCKL) bought 10% of Li Yuen Pte Ltd's shares in PT Obi Nickel Cobalt (ONC) in a transaction that took place Friday (13/12)

title: Amir Sunarko now owns 5.61% of SLJ Global (SULI) after purchasing 332 million shares
body: Amir Sunarko purchased approximately 332.44 million shares of PT SLJ Global Tbk (SULI) via PT Binaartha Sekuritas on Thursday, December 5. This most recent individual investor then swiftly acquired 5.61% of the forestry and logging company's shares.

title: Under special monitoring, FASW to raise funds via 1 million shares rights issue
body: PT Fajar Surya Wasesa Tbk (FASW), a paper producer for packaging materials, will raise fresh funds through additional capital by providing pre-emptive rights (PMHMETD) or a rights issue.

title: INAF sells assets for IDR312.94 billion to pay for employee rightsizing and debt
body: PT Indofarma announced that it will sell its assets worth around IDR 312.94 billion consisting of land and buildings located in 10 provinces in Indonesia.

title: After Canada, STTP to explore US market
body: PT Siantar Top Tbk (STTP), a snack producer, is exploring the United States (US) market to expand export sales potential in the future.

title: Official, BJTM injects capital to two regional banks
body: PT Bank Pembangunan Daerah (BPD) Jawa Timur Tbk (BJTM) is officially allocating capital of up to IDR 200 billion to Regional Banks (BPD) of Southeast Sulawesi and East Nusa Tenggara.

title: Going private, MASA sets exercise price to IDR 8,400
body: PT Multistrada Arah Sarana Tbk (MASA) has decided to set buyback price to a fantastic price level at IDR 8,400 per share following its go-private plan.
